items.title: Analysis artifact schemas are versioned
items.description: DuckDB schema includes indicator_daily, pattern_signal_daily, and capital_feature_daily with the expected as-of keys.

items.title: Deterministic analysis bootstrap exists
items.description: A developer can regenerate indicators, pattern signals, and capital features from the seeded price series foundation.

items.title: Indicators and pattern signals are readable via as-of APIs
items.description: Per-stock analysis endpoints return indicator history, same-day multiple pattern signals, and capital features at a target snapshot.

items.title: Developer loop surfaces analysis artifact health
items.description: Init and smoke display current analysis artifact table status and validate the new analysis APIs.
